title: stelis morula
intro: Stelis morula, also known as the "Garden Orchid" or "Purple-flowered Stelis", is a type of orchid plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Stelis morula has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
